sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26754" key="di/zwos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δίζωος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ζωή</etym>) <sense id="n26754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with two lives,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φὼρ δίζωος,</foreign> i. e. Sisyphus, who returned from Hades, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0208.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
